---
title: Thanksgiving parade
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1779805924/parade_v8q0vx.png
description: Parade
categories: ["miscellaneous"]
date: 2025-11-10
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1779805924/parade_v8q0vx.png)


::: {.visually-hidden}
{{< meta description >}}
:::
